osninterface 0.2.0
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Lazily fetch state vectors for a date range

Source: R/fetch.R
osn_fetch_days.Rd

Convenience wrapper around osn_fetch_day() that spans multiple days.

Usage

osn_fetch_days(from, to, con = NULL, downsample_s = 5, bbox = NULL)

Arguments

from

Start date (inclusive).

to

End date (inclusive).

con

A DBI connection from osn_connect(). If NULL, a new connection is created automatically.

downsample_s

Optional integer. Keep only state vectors whose Unix time is a multiple of this many seconds (time %% downsample_s == 0). Default 5. Set to NULL, 0, or 1 to keep every row.

bbox

Optional bounding box (see osn_fetch_day()) pushed into the Trino query for the "osn-historical-trino" source.

Value

A lazy tbl_dbi (dbplyr table).

On this page
